final_prompt.prompt:
Create a surrealist dreamscape illustration with philosophical depth and visual impact.

Style/medium: needs a surrealist dreamscape aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple symbolic elements arranged with visual impact — exact framing and balance are yours
Subject: must include a giant moon rising from the sea, whales flying in the sky, melting clocks, and a staircase leading to the clouds
Scene/backdrop: must include a seascape with moon rising, sky with flying whales, and clouds
Lighting/mood: needs a dreamlike, philosophical atmosphere — exact light source and mood balance are yours
Color palette: needs a surreal, dreamlike direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
